name: VideoMemory
description: Let coding agents create video monitors that wake their own Vibe Research sessions.
keywords: Set the service URL and provider agents should wake.
Start a monitor and allow camera access when the browser asks.

access.label: vibe-research catalog
access.detail: VideoMemory is mirrored from the Vibe Research building catalog as manifest-only setup metadata.

agentGuide.summary: Use VideoMemory when an agent needs a camera or video monitor that can wake a Vibe Research session later.
useCases: Create a monitor that watches a browser/camera condition and wakes an agent.
Check whether camera permission or service URL setup is blocking monitors.
Record monitor IDs, task URLs, and artifact paths in the Library when they matter.
